leadText: If you were looking for the location from Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon, see Sandy Cave (Mystery Dungeon). Sandy Cave (Japanese: 浜辺(はまべ)の洞穴(ほらあな) Beach Cave) is a location on Melemele Island in Alola. There is an entrance to the cave on Big Wave Beach. It only appears in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] This is a small cave to the south of Big Wave Beach . It is mostly filled with water, and contains a few items. Lapras Paddle , Sharpedo Jet , and Machamp Shove are required to fully explore the area.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Big Pearl In the center of an island in the middle of the cave (requires Lapras Surf or Sharpedo Jet ) US UM Light Clay Above the ledge on the southeastern shore (requires Sharpedo Jet ) US UM TM24 ( Thunderbolt ) Behind the boulder in the northern corner of the cave (requires Machamp Shove ) US UM
